summary: Authentication layer testing complete. All 11 features tested. Passcode gate blocks main page, counselor app unprotected, correct passcode authenticates, lock button works, session persists across refresh. Backend APIs all working (15/15 tests pass).
critical_code_review_comments: PasscodeGate.jsx implements SHA-256 hash validation correctly
useAuth hook properly manages sessionStorage with token and timestamp
LockButton component correctly wired to lock function
App.js correctly routes /counselor as unprotected, /* as protected
MaskedPasscodeInput uses onKeyDown for character-by-character input with brief reveal
Session timeout (45 min) and warning (40 min) implemented with activity listeners
context_for_next_testing_agent: Authentication layer added to admin dashboard. Passcode 'Camp1993' required for main page access. Counselor app at /counselor remains unprotected. Lock button in top-right corner returns to passcode screen. Session stored in sessionStorage with 45-min timeout. Use page.keyboard.press() for typing passcode in Playwright tests, not input.fill(). Use dispatch_event('click') for lock button if regular click doesn't work.

features_tested.passcode_gate_main_page: PASS - Passcode gate shows on main page blocking all content
features_tested.counselor_unprotected: PASS - /counselor loads directly without passcode gate
features_tested.wrong_passcode_error: PASS - Shows 'Invalid passcode (X attempts remaining)' with 2-second delay
features_tested.correct_passcode_auth: PASS - 'Camp1993' authenticates and shows map dashboard
features_tested.lock_button_visible: PASS - Lock button visible in top-right after authentication
features_tested.lock_button_works: PASS - Clicking lock button returns to passcode screen
features_tested.session_persistence: PASS - Session persists across page refresh
features_tested.submit_disabled_empty: PASS - Enter button disabled when input is empty

notes.playwright_tip: Use page.keyboard.press() for each character when typing passcode, not input.fill(). The MaskedPasscodeInput uses onKeyDown handler.
notes.lock_button_tip: Use dispatch_event('click') if regular click doesn't trigger the lock function
